note: Authority revocation input (docs/skills/standard/03). Listing a slug/keyId here makes the next `npm run skills:sign` append a signed authority record with a skill-revoke / key-revoke event; the verifier then returns `revoked`. `asOf` is the deterministic stamp for the appended record. Removing an entry does NOT rewrite history — it appends a later record (the revocation stays in the chain).
